title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Dishis Designer Jewellery - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Dishis Designer Jewellery - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Digital Marketing Manager with drive and ambition, Dishis Designer Jewellery in Delhi is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Dishis Designer Jewellery:
Dishis Designer Jewellery is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in WooCommerce

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Delhi, Delhi, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Dishis Designer Jewellery!
